---
name: Task
about: Technical work (refactoring, infrastructure, tooling, etc.)
title: '[TASK] '
labels: ['task', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## Task Description

Clear description of the technical work to be done.

## Motivation

Why is this task needed? What problem does it solve?

## Scope

What's included in this task:
- [ ] Item 1
- [ ] Item 2
- [ ] Item 3

What's NOT included (out of scope):
- Item A
- Item B

## Technical Approach

Describe the proposed approach or solution.

**Alternatives considered** (optional):
- Alternative 1: [pros/cons]
- Alternative 2: [pros/cons]

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Dependencies

- Depends on #XX
- Blocks #YY
- Related to #ZZ

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Code follows [`.github/instructions/`](../../.github/instructions/)
- [ ] Tests updated if applicable
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Code reviewed and approved
- [ ] CI checks passing
- [ ] No breaking changes (or breaking changes documented)

## Additional Context

Add any other context, diagrams, or references here.

---

**For AI Agents:** 
- Create a feature branch: `task/issue-XX-description`
- Follow [`.github/instructions/`](../../.github/instructions/)
- In your PR description, use `Closes #XX` to auto-close this task when merged
- Read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#for-ai-agents) before starting work
